rulings.Case Title: LEONARD SHIELDS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, DECEMBER 19, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.¿s motion to consolidate actions for all purposes is continued on the court¿s own motion to January 7, 2014. Additionally, the court never received a courtesy copy of defendant¿s moving papers. Defendant must deliver one to Department 503. = (503/TLJ)
